.file-embed.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.metadata-properties.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(255, 149, 0, 0.25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

table::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
table::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

tbody.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(246, 246, 246) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
